entry.title: Cline
entry.description: Open-source autonomous coding agent extension for planning, editing, running commands, and using tools from VS Code.
entry.seoTitle: Cline autonomous coding agent for VS Code
entry.seoDescription: Cline is an open-source autonomous coding agent extension for planning, editing, terminal commands, and tools. HeyClaude adds source links, install steps,...
entry.author: Cline
entry.cardDescription: Open-source autonomous coding agent for VS Code.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Cline is useful for users who want a visible agent loop inside VS Code with command execution and file-editing control.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
